## New Resource Submission

Thanks for contributing! Please fill out every field below. Incomplete submissions will be asked to revise before review.

---

### Resource Type
- [ ] Paper
- [ ] Dataset
- [ ] Code / Software

### Subfield
> Which `docs/` page does this belong on?

**Subfield:**

---

### Resource Details

**Title:**

**Link:**

**Year** *(papers only)*:

**One-sentence description:**
> Describe what this is or why it matters, in plain language. One sentence is enough.

---

### Why is this a good addition?
> 2–3 sentences max. What gap does it fill on this page? Is it widely used, a seminal work, an important benchmark, or a particularly well-maintained codebase?

---

### Checklist
- [ ] I have verified the link works and leads to the correct resource
- [ ] I have followed the table format in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My description is accurate and written in my own words
- [ ] I have checked for duplicates on the relevant subfield page
